monitor.hide_taskbar_tip: Hide the Windows taskbar on this monitor
monitor.select_monitor: Select a monitor above to configure

slideshow.sync_settings_tip: Synchronize interval and mode across all monitors
slideshow.apply_tip: Apply changed settings to running slideshow

settings.pause_on_fullscreen_tip: Auto-pause when a fullscreen app (game, video, etc.) is detected

profile.name: Profile name
profile.load_confirm: Load profile '{{name}}'? Current settings will be replaced.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.priority_notice: When times overlap, the schedule listed first takes priority. Use arrows to reorder.
schedule.same_time_warning: Same start and end time creates a 24-hour slot that blocks other schedules

faq.title: Help
faq.basics_1: Add a folder to start a slideshow with its images. Supported formats: JPG, PNG, BMP, WEBP
faq.basics_2: Each monitor can have independent folders, intervals, and modes (Sequential/Shuffle)
faq.basics_3: Enable sync to apply the same interval and mode across all monitors
faq.basics_4: Drag images in the grid to reorder the playback sequence
faq.favorites_1: Click the heart icon on an image to add it to favorites
faq.favorites_2: In Shuffle mode, favorite images appear 3x more frequently
faq.favorites_3: Enable favorites-only filter to play only favorited images
faq.profiles_1: Save up to 6 profiles. Each stores folders, images, intervals, modes, and taskbar state
faq.profiles_2: Right-click a profile name for edit/update/delete/thumbnail options
faq.profiles_3: Use Ctrl+Alt+1~6 to instantly switch profiles
faq.profiles_4: The last used profile is automatically applied on app restart
faq.schedule_1: Create up to 6 time slots to automatically switch profiles at specific times
faq.schedule_2: When schedule is enabled, the matching time slot is auto-applied on app launch
faq.zen_1: Hides taskbar and desktop icons for immersive wallpaper viewing
faq.zen_2: Zen mode interval can be set separately in Settings (default 30s)
faq.zen_3: Press ESC to exit Zen mode
faq.hotkeys_3: Ctrl+Alt+F: Add/remove current image from favorites
faq.hotkeys_5: Each hotkey can be enabled/disabled in Settings > Hotkeys
faq.trouble_1: Wallpaper switching to Tile mode is normal Windows behavior for per-monitor wallpapers
faq.trouble_2: If a monitor isn't detected, try restarting the app
faq.trouble_3: If hotkeys don't work, another program may be using the same key combination
faq.trouble_4: Deleted folders are automatically skipped during slideshow
faq.trouble_5: Corrupted settings are automatically reset to defaults
faq.trouble_6: If wallpaper fade transition doesn't work: Settings → Accessibility → Visual effects → turn on Animation effects
